Trade Forex, S&P 500, Gold, EURUSD and
30+ assets

Get immediate access to cryptocurrencies, stock indices, commodities and forex with a single Forex-based platform

Open Account

Go beyond expectations

A breakthrough in CFD trading and online investment is uniquely delivered to traders with Treasure trade innovative approach to online trading. Our state-of-the-art trading tools, analytical instruments, and advanced technological solutions allow traders of any level to get to the frontline of market performance. With ultra-modern and multi-channel access to 350+ assets in five categories (Forex, commodities, cryptocurrencies, indices, stocks) – a solid CFD product – our traders are set off to pin down a great variety of trading opportunities they may come across. Think global, trade the new-century way with Treasure trade.

Get to the forefront of trading

Setup Your Trading Account

It only takes 40 seconds.

Profit from Market Ups & Downs

Treasure-trade allows you to actively trade most popular cryptocurrencies such as Bitcoin, Ethereum, Ripple, Litecoin and more, profit from market rallies and declines, or hedge your existing cryptocurrency holdings

Risk Disclosure:  Treasure Trade recommends traders to know that online trading and CFDs are complex instruments, and come with a high risk of losing money rapidly and known as a ‘high risk’ monetary activity that has the potential to cause the trader to lose part of, or all of, the invested funds in a relatively short time period. All traders are kindly advised to decide if this activity will fit their needs.
